input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.7.6.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.7.6.2
            TITLE: when between the centerlines of the front and rear wheel axles:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.7.6.2: When between the centerlines of the front and rear wheel axles:
T.7.6.2 When between the centerlines of the front and rear wheel axles:   
Inboard of a line drawn connecting the outer surfaces of the front and rear tires at the height 
of the wheel centers

final_answer: When between the centerlines of the front and rear wheel axles: Inboard of a line drawn connecting the outer surfaces of the front and rear tires at the height of the wheel centers
